abort.invalid_controller_selection: The selected controller list is no longer valid. Restart setup and try again.
abort.invalid_flow_state: iZone setup reached an unexpected internal state. Restart setup and try again.
abort.no_controller_chosen: No controllers were selected to set up.
abort.skipped_pending_discovery: Controllers you skipped are offered again as discovered iZone devices. Finish setup under **Settings** > **Devices & services** when you are ready.

airflow_max.description: Sets the airflow maximum percent for a zone.
airflow_max.name: Set maximum airflow

airflow_min.description: Sets the airflow minimum percent for a zone.
airflow_min.name: Set minimum airflow
